raw_consumer_statement: Last year, XX/XX/XXXX, my Citibank credit card was hacked. So I immediately called Citibank to report and investigate about it. They told me to pay the balance on the account first, then theyd look into the problem, told me to wait 3 months, and then would give me a call so I paid the payment. But after I waited 3 months, I didnt receive any call, so I called the Citibank again and another different representative picked up my call and told me to pay minimum payment first again and theyd investigate the fraudulent transactions. And also said that the credit card was changed but I didnt received any new card. And after 3 months I called the bank again but this time they said they have changed another new card for me and that theyd give me credits but I didnt get a new card and any credits. Again told me to wait 3 months. Between then I made calls about the case but I didnt get any certain answers from Citibank . XX/XX/XXXX, 2 weeks ago I called the bank again, told me to wait 14 days but it has been more than 2 weeks, didnt receive any response from the bank.
